certification_rule: Controls are mandatory and must be evaluated before theorem certification can be claimed.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: No split, no triangle, no support, no path accommodation.
controls.purpose: No first association seed is available.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: No stable same-sign triangle/shell dominance certification.
controls.purpose: Association selection is randomized rather than gradient-minimized.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: Quarantined or fails admission because spreading is instantaneous.
controls.purpose: Association proposals commit without one-cycle latency.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: Fails split-vacuum admissibility; cannot represent six pending branch slots.
controls.purpose: Split site is incorrectly restricted to three total branch slots.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: Forms triangle/duplicate activity, not shell support candidate.
controls.purpose: Shell candidate amplitude is below or equal to the lower shell threshold.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: Forms independent high-amplitude triangle, not shell support candidate.
controls.purpose: Shell candidate amplitude is above the accepted shell-admission window.
Association geometry is generated without SOO persistence.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: No Delta L certification from load/null alone.
controls.purpose: Center load/null is recorded but carrier invalidity is not admitted.

controls.expected_non_certifying_behavior: Must be rejected before execution or classified as leakage/manipulation failure.
controls.purpose: A malicious or contaminated generator is given target Delta L or sign-label dispatch.
